content.seo_title: For Students: Mastering User Onboarding (Advanced Checklist)
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between no SaaS knowledge and professional product engineering. Master user onboarding with this advanced checklist using Antigravity and Claude.
content.answer_block: User onboarding is the bridge between a visitor and a loyal user. By implementing a frictionless, milestone-driven flow using Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform complex SaaS logic into an intuitive interface. This checklist provides the exact technical architecture to build professional-grade onboarding that drives immediate user retention and project success.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and you are staring at an empty repository. You know the code, but you don't know how to turn it into a product. The gulf between writing functions and building a SaaS application is defined by one thing: the user's first sixty seconds in your app. Without onboarding, your code is just a feature; with it, it becomes a business.

Stop feeling like an outsider to the SaaS world. You are about to bridge that gap. By leveraging advanced tooling like Antigravity and Claude Code, we are going to architect an onboarding flow that doesn't just explain your app—it converts users into power users before they even reach your dashboard. Let’s build your first professional-grade milestone.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the specific action that proves value to the user. We will map this to a state-driven onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current SaaS codebase and identify the core value-add feature. Generate a state machine design for a 3-step onboarding flow leading to this feature.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze codebase for core value feature and design onboarding state machine'

steps.title: Implement Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Use non-intrusive overlays to guide users through the UI, ensuring they understand the layout immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate React components for contextual tooltips that trigger based on user interaction history.

steps.title: Build a Progress Tracker
steps.description: Gamify the setup process by showing a completion bar, which psychologically encourages users to finish onboarding.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a persistent progress bar component that syncs with user profile completion status in Supabase.

steps.title: Conditional Feature Gating
steps.description: Ensure users aren't overwhelmed by hiding advanced features until they complete basic onboarding tasks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the UI to use a feature-flag system that unlocks advanced modules only after onboarding completion.

steps.title: Automated Feedback Loops
steps.description: Integrate a micro-survey at the end of onboarding to capture qualitative data on the user's experience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a lightweight, high-conversion feedback modal that triggers upon reaching the dashboard for the first time.

pro_tips: Never force a user to sign up before showing them the product value; use 'value-first' onboarding.
Keep your onboarding under four steps to minimize cognitive load and drop-off rates.
Use 'empty states' as educational opportunities rather than dead ends.
Track the time-to-value (TTV) metric; if it takes more than 2 minutes, your onboarding is too complex.
Personalize the onboarding journey based on the user's stated goal during the initial sign-up.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, deploy your app to Vercel and track user behavior using PostHog to see where users drop off, then iterate on those specific steps.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the blueprint to turn a simple project into a professional SaaS product. Don't let your code sit on your hard drive—deploy it, test it, and scale it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
